project: 教师资源发展平台 / China Teacher Resources Development Platform
note: Canonical bilingual glossary. Single source of truth for terminology. The glossary checker (harness/glossary-check.mjs) reads this file. Terms originate from the V1.3 workflow spec (source-docs/workflow-v1.3.zh-CN.md); when a term is resolved or changed, edit it HERE and nowhere else.

rules.casing_en: Use the canonical English exactly as written (sentence case unless a proper noun).
rules.punctuation_zh: Chinese prose uses full-width punctuation （，。！？：；“”）. Half-width is flagged.
rules.first_use: On first use in a document, write the bilingual pair: 简中 (English). Thereafter either is acceptable.
rules.forbidden_is_error: Any term listed under variants_forbidden is a P1 finding — replace with the canonical term.
rules.code_identifiers: State-machine field names (course_state, teacher_mode, …) are code identifiers: always snake_case in inline code, never translated.

terms.definition_zh: 面向幼儿园教师的网页版AI陪跑对话平台，支持围绕本土文化资源的主题探究课程建设。
terms.definition_en: The web-based AI companion chat platform for kindergarten teachers, supporting theme-inquiry curriculum built around local cultural resources.

terms.definition_zh: 平台的核心AI角色：按状态机分阶段陪伴教师推进主题探究，等待真实反馈后再继续，不替教师和儿童做完所有决定。
terms.definition_en: The platform's core AI role: accompanies the teacher stage-by-stage per the state machine, waits for real feedback before continuing, and never decides everything on behalf of teachers or children.

terms.definition_zh: 分阶段、以真实回传为节拍的持续陪伴模式；区别于一次性生成完整方案。
terms.definition_en: The staged accompaniment mode paced by real classroom feedback round-trips; the opposite of one-shot full-plan generation.

terms.definition_zh: 反表单化的建档与引导方式：先读状态再提问、一次一问、必附示例答案、可推断的信息不再问、已满足的关卡静默跳过。
terms.definition_en: The anti-form-filling intake and elicitation style: read state before asking, one question at a time, always with example answers, never asking the inferable, silently skipping satisfied gates.

terms.definition_zh: 每轮收尾必含的四要素：本轮可以去做什么；建议生成/使用哪些素材；回来请告诉我什么；我收到后会继续帮你做什么。
terms.definition_en: The mandatory four-part round ending: what you can go do; what materials to generate/use; what to tell me when you return; what I will do next once I receive it.

terms.definition_zh: 每门课程的状态机文档（代码标识符 course_state），记录阶段、证据、问题池、目标轴心与循环历史；由确定性引擎而非大模型决定流转。
terms.definition_en: The per-course state-machine document (code identifier course_state) recording stage, evidence, question pool, goals axis, and cycle history; transitions are decided by a deterministic engine, not the LLM.

terms.definition_zh: WF03b 的产物：教师原始主题、初步目标、推荐儿童入口、儿童可感知内容、可做深方向、第一轮体验建议、需避免的成人化表达。
terms.definition_en: The WF03b artifact: original theme, initial goal, recommended child entry points, perceivable content, deepening directions, first-round experience suggestion, and adult-phrasing to avoid.

terms.definition_zh: WF02b：判断主题适合走到哪一步——短活动型、主题探究型，或项目化探究潜力型；不把所有主题硬推成项目。
terms.definition_en: WF02b: judging how far a theme can go — short activity, theme inquiry, or project-inquiry potential; never forcing every theme into a project.

terms.definition_zh: 从儿童原话和表征中整理出的真实问题集合，带来源证据与分类，剔除无儿童证据的成人化问题。
terms.definition_en: The set of authentic questions distilled from children's own words and representations, with source evidence and categories; adult-fabricated questions without child evidence are excluded.

terms.definition_zh: 从儿童问题池推导、按儿童性/真实性/行动性/公共性/文化可能性校验的课程核心问题。
terms.definition_en: The course's central question derived from the child question pool and validated for child-appropriateness, authenticity, actionability, public relevance, and cultural possibility.

terms.definition_zh: 文化目标的五层推进：感知层、理解层、关系层、情感层、行动层；先判断当前主题适合停在哪一层，不默认追求最高层。
terms.definition_en: The five-rung progression of cultural goals: perception, understanding, relationship, affection, action; judge which rung fits now instead of defaulting to the top.

terms.definition_zh: 只面向教师后台的文化线索，必须转译为儿童能看、听、问、试、画、说、访谈、比较的小任务；无证据时只能说“可能”。
terms.definition_en: A teacher-backstage-only cultural thread, always translated into child-sized tasks (look, listen, ask, try, draw, tell, interview, compare); phrased as 'possibly' when evidence is absent.

terms.definition_zh: WF20：把失败或卡住的点回到儿童经验中复盘，转化为下一轮探究的起点；教师不得直接替孩子修正答案。
terms.definition_en: WF20: returning failures and stuck points to children's experience for review, turning them into the next round's inquiry; teachers must not correct answers on children's behalf.

terms.definition_zh: V1.3 新增回传字段（代码标识符 child_participation_difference）：最主动的孩子、还在观察的孩子、和预设不一样的孩子；不把个别反应概括为全班兴趣。
terms.definition_en: The V1.3 feedback field (code identifier child_participation_difference): the most active child, the still-observing child, and the child unlike the teacher's expectation; individual reactions are never generalized to whole-class interest.

terms.definition_zh: V1.3 新增回传字段（代码标识符 teacher_focus_feedback）：最值得保留的一条儿童证据；相比上一轮的新变化；下一轮最希望智能体判断的一个问题（第三句须由智能体先给示例）。
terms.definition_en: The V1.3 feedback field (code identifier teacher_focus_feedback): the single most keep-worthy piece of child evidence; the new change since last round; the one question the teacher most wants judged next round (the agent drafts examples for the third sentence first).

terms.definition_zh: 五阶段判断（代码标识符 child_learning_stage）：感知体验、问题生成、尝试探究、关系理解、表达迁移。
terms.definition_en: The five-stage judgment (code identifier child_learning_stage): sensory experience, question generation, trial inquiry, relationship understanding, expressive transfer.

terms.definition_zh: 主题可能长成项目化探究的证据信号；累计出现3个以上才输出提醒，规模从证据里长出来。
terms.definition_en: Evidence signals that a theme may grow into project-based inquiry; an alert fires only when three or more accumulate — scale grows from evidence.

terms.definition_zh: WF05b：为幼儿生成3个可问的问题、为教师/家长生成3个补充问题，让儿童听到本地人的真实表达；问题必须具体、生活化。
terms.definition_en: WF05b: three askable questions for children plus three follow-ups for adults, so children hear real local voices; questions must be concrete and life-scale.

terms.definition_zh: 阶段5的最终沉淀：以真实发生顺序和证据组织的课程叙事，支持完整案例、汇报摘要、申报、公众号多版本导出。
terms.definition_en: The Stage 5 distillate: the course narrative organized by true chronology and evidence, exportable as full case, report summary, application, and social-media versions.

terms.definition_zh: 没有儿童原话、作品、照片、观察等证据时，只能提出可能方向和补证据任务；不得编造儿童兴趣、问题、进展和目标达成。
terms.definition_en: Without child evidence (utterances, works, photos, observations), only possible directions plus an evidence-gathering task may be offered; fabricating child interest, questions, progress, or attainment is forbidden.

terms.definition_zh: 生产/演示中对模型逐轮生效的四层治理（系统提示词、结构化输出、确定性校验器、带反馈重生成）；与约束仓库的开发护栏相区分。
terms.definition_en: The four-layer per-turn governance of the model in demo/production (system prompt, structured output, deterministic validators, regenerate-with-feedback); distinct from the dev harness that governs the repo.

terms.definition_zh: 约束本仓库的治理工具链：提交门禁、术语一致性、双语对齐、结构检查等；对开发者与编码智能体生效。
terms.definition_en: The governance toolchain constraining this repo: commit gate, terminology consistency, bilingual parity, structure checks; applies to developers and coding agents.

terms.definition_zh: 与供应商无关的 OpenAI 兼容调用层：MiniMax 默认，GLM、Kimi 备选故障转移，Qwen 评估开关。
terms.definition_en: The provider-agnostic OpenAI-compatible calling layer: MiniMax default, GLM and Kimi fallback failover, Qwen behind an evaluation flag.

terms.definition_zh: 五种入口（代码标识符 teacher_mode）：从零陪跑、已有主题优化、过程中续聊、课程故事整理、素材支持；由智能体推断并轻确认，不让教师看菜单选择。
terms.definition_en: The five entry modes (code identifier teacher_mode): from zero, optimize existing, mid-course feedback, story export, material support; inferred by the agent and lightly confirmed, never presented as a menu.
